creator: brad@brad-x.com
text:
I'm going to have to hold off on testing until vmware is resolved; it's a
dependency on Windows I can't risk - the other system I use (this one)
inexplicably works with Staroffice 5.2 using both the old Linux base and
the old Linux emulation code, so it wouldn't provide much of an accurate
testing platform.

I'll certainly keep you informed as soon as I can.

Cheers,
Brad

// -- http://www.BRAD-X.com/ -- //

On Sat, 24 Nov 2001, David W. Chapman Jr. wrote:

> On Sat, Nov 24, 2001 at 08:34:56PM -0500, Brad Laue wrote:
> > Just realized this wasn't going to the PR list. :( I have a spare box to
> > test linux-base-7 on. If it works, will you be able to close this PR?
> >
> > Brad
> >
> Yes I will.
>
> --
